scenes.script: Magnez është bërë temë kudo, dhe është krejt e merituar.
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Close-up of a glossy magnesium mineral symbol (Mg) made of subtle crystal-like particles on a dark neutral surface; small floating icons representing “trending everywhere” (news ticker style) blur in the background. Gentle camera push-in feel, calm positive mood.

scenes.script: Ky mineral luan rol në mbi 300 procese në trup: nga sinteza e proteinave dhe funksioni i muskujve e nervave…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Conceptual visual: semi-transparent heart/brain/muscle silhouette made of thin connected light lines; tiny nodes marked with subtle labels “proteins”, “muscles”, “nerves” around a central Mg symbol. Light particles flow along the lines to imply “300+ processes”; no people visible, serene scientific mood.

scenes.script: …deri te rregullimi i presionit të gjakut, prodhimi i energjisë, inflamacioni dhe kockat.
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Object-only conceptual infographic: four separate clusters on a dark tabletop—(1) a blood pressure gauge with a soft glow, (2) a small energy bolt inside a mitochondria-like shape, (3) a calming anti-inflammatory shield icon, (4) a bone icon with gentle highlights. A central magnesium atom icon connects them with thin lines; upbeat informative tone.

scenes.script: Por a po e merr vërtet mjaftueshëm?
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Close-up of a nutrition scale-like dial with “Mg intake” and a partially filled progress bar ending below target; a small magnifying glass smoothly moves toward the number “320–420 mg”. Subtle motion feel, concerned-but-neutral mood (no person).

scenes.script: Thuhet se rreth 60% e të rriturve nuk arrijnë dozën e rekomanduar prej 320 deri në 420 mg në ditë…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Split visual: left side shows a pie chart with “60%” highlighted in muted color; right side shows a target zone labeled “320–420 mg/day” with only a small segment filled. A hand-painted style? No—keep photoreal: use crisp flat UI elements integrated into a dark scene; slight camera pan for life.

scenes.script: …dhe mungesa mund të sjellë ngërçe, probleme humori dhe madje të përziera.
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Object-only three-part scene: (1) a curled ribbon icon labeled “cramps” (looks like tight muscle), (2) a half-moon face emoticon icon with a muted worried color labeled “mood”, (3) a small stomach-like icon with gentle swirl labeled “nausea”. Magnesium atom icon fades out to imply deficiency; subtle, slightly tense mood but not scary.

scenes.script: Për fat, ushqimi e bën shumë më të lehtë…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. A wooden board with a “meal prep” vibe: ingredients appear arranged neatly with soft natural light. A magnesium pill-shaped object dissolves into the air and is replaced by food items (no people). Mood turns hopeful and light.

scenes.script: …me opsione si kivi, avokado, arra, bishtajore, bajame, spinaq, fara chia ose liri, drithëra të plota…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Top-down food collage on a dark neutral table: sliced kiwi (green with seeds), avocado halves, mixed nuts (almonds/wooden bowl), a small pile of legumes/beans, spinach leaves, chia seeds and flax seeds in small ramekins, plus whole grains (oats or whole wheat kernels) in a tidy section. Fresh natural lighting, clean layout, satisfying texture detail.

ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Close-up side-by-side: banana slices arranged in a curve; a plated piece of fresh salmon with slight natural sheen; a few flax seeds sprinkled around to connect the theme. Camera angle is slightly tilted for energy, calm appetizing mood.

scenes.script: E papritura është kjo: nga ushqimet nuk ka “efekte negative”…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Conceptual comparison without people: two transparent containers—left labeled “food” with healthy ingredient icons floating calmly; right labeled “supplements” with small warning triangles subtly hovering. In the left container, a “no side effects” checkmark stamp appears via visual animation effect; clean and reassuring mood.

scenes.script: …përveç alergjisë, ndërsa me suplementet mund të ketë laksativitet dhe rrezik nga përbërësit.
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Object-only: supplement bottle with label “Mg” behind a subtle blur; beside it, an alert icon cluster with “laxative risk” symbol (gentle stomach/passage icon) and “ingredient sensitivity” shield. Replace with a calm “allergy caution” note sign by the food container. Slightly serious tone, still non-scary.

scenes.script: Dëshiron një listë të saktë të këtyre 13 ushqimeve për çdo ditë…
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. Minimal overhead shot: a notebook page on a dark desk with a clean checklist titled “13 foods/day”. A pen moves to tick boxes while food thumbnails (kiwi, avocado, nuts, legumes, almonds, spinach, chia/flax, whole grains, banana, salmon) appear as small icons beside each line. Motion implied by pen position, inviting tone.

scenes.script: …apo të duhet këshillë për suplementin? Komento.
scenes.prompt: ultra realistic 4:5 vertical, clean composition, minimal background, natural colors, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, slightly dark tones, balanced contrast. The same woman from the reference image appears: realistic, fit, natural look. She points toward the notebook’s two options written as big cards: “List për çdo ditë (13 ushqime)” and “Këshillë për suplementin”. Warm, friendly expression; camera at chest level with slight shallow DOF. Keep background minimal, no clutter. Ensure her hairstyle and facial identity match the reference.
